questions.subject: Chemistry
questions.examName: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced
questions.q: Paragraph:(i) $\mathrm{P}+\mathrm{C}$ (carbon) $+\mathrm{Cl}_2 \longrightarrow \mathrm{Q}+\mathrm{CO}^{\uparrow}$ (ii) $\mathrm{Q}+\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O} \longrightarrow \mathrm{R}+\mathrm{HCl}$ (iii) $\mathrm{BN}+\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O} \longrightarrow \mathrm{R}+\mathrm{NH}_3 \uparrow$ (iv) $\mathrm{Q}+\mathrm{LiAlH}_4 \longrightarrow \mathrm{~S}+\mathrm{LiCl}+\mathrm{AlCl}_3$ (v) $\mathrm{S}+\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O} \longrightarrow \mathrm{R}+\mathrm{H}_2 \uparrow$ (vi) $\mathrm{S}+\mathrm{NaH} \longrightarrow \mathrm{T}$ (P, Q, R, S and T do not represent their chemical symbols)Question: $T$ is used as a/an
questions.source: Most Important Selected Qs for JEE Advanced

questions.q: Paragraph:(i) $\mathrm{P}+\mathrm{C}$ (carbon) $+\mathrm{Cl}_2 \longrightarrow \mathrm{Q}+\mathrm{CO}^{\uparrow}$ (ii) $\mathrm{Q}+\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O} \longrightarrow \mathrm{R}+\mathrm{HCl}$ (iii) $\mathrm{BN}+\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O} \longrightarrow \mathrm{R}+\mathrm{NH}_3 \uparrow$ (iv) $\mathrm{Q}+\mathrm{LiAlH}_4 \longrightarrow \mathrm{~S}+\mathrm{LiCl}+\mathrm{AlCl}_3$ (v) $\mathrm{S}+\mathrm{H}_2 \mathrm{O} \longrightarrow \mathrm{R}+\mathrm{H}_2 \uparrow$ (vi) $\mathrm{S}+\mathrm{NaH} \longrightarrow \mathrm{T}$ (P, Q, R, S and T do not represent their chemical symbols)Question:Compound Q has (i) Zero dipole moment (ii) A planar trigonal structure (iii) An electron deficient compound (iv) A Lewis base Choose the correct code
